name: Curried Garbanzos
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté the onion, garlic, and grated ginger in 1/4 cup vegetable broth for 10 minutes.
2. Add potatoes and fresh tomato to the pot. Cook and stir until all vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients: garbanzo beans, tomato paste, canned tomatoes, coriander, black pepper, cumin, cloves, and cinnamon.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil. Cover and reduce heat. Simmer for approximately 30 minutes until the potatoes are fully cooked.
5. Serve hot.
